title: Godot parity slice (mirrors demo-vertical-slice)
description: Same player-visible behaviors as demo-vertical-slice but Godot proofs. Traceability: node titles align with demo-vertical-slice.workflow.json. Oracle until M6: Unity slice; after archive, Godot tests are canonical. Primary automation: KyndeBlade_Godot/tests/run_headless_tests.gd (layer godot_headless). Shipping filenames, autosave, migration, export: sibling workflow godot-steam-build. Granular component nodes: workflow godot-demo-components.

nodes.title: Main scene map bootstraps at tour
nodes.description: Parity: demo-main-map-bootstraps-tour. Given New Game, when hub loads, GameState.current_location_id is tour. Proof: godot_headless _test_game_state_tour + manual STEAM_BUILD.md.

nodes.title: Tour location lists Fair Field as next
nodes.description: Parity: demo-map-graph-tour-to-fayre-felde. Hub exposes Fair Field travel (data id fayre_felde). Proof: godot_headless _test_slice_locations_json + hub_map.gd; manual.

nodes.title: Fair Field encounter wired to False
nodes.description: Parity: demo-fayre-felde-encounter-wired. EncounterDef enemy_id false; combat uses EncounterDef. Proof: godot_headless _test_encounter_resource + combat_manager.gd + combat_scenarios.gd.

nodes.title: Save checkpoint updates current location
nodes.description: Parity: demo-checkpoint-updates-location. SaveService.save_progress updates location_id. Proof: godot_headless _test_save_roundtrip_service.

nodes.title: Game progress persistence roundtrip
nodes.description: Parity: demo-progress-json-roundtrip. ConfigFile save/load fields match. Proof: godot_headless run_headless_tests.gd save/meta sections.

nodes.title: Pause overlay present after bootstrap
nodes.description: Parity: demo-pause-overlay-present. Combat scene PauseLayer; Escape toggles; tree pause freezes defensive window tick (godot_headless _test_combat_pause_freezes_window_tick_smoke). Proof: manual + combat.tscn.

nodes.title: Settings master volume persists
nodes.description: Parity: demo-settings-volume-persists. SaveService settings cfg. Proof: godot_headless _test_settings_volume.

nodes.title: Continue when save exists
nodes.description: Parity: demo-continue-available-when-save-exists. has_save gates Continue. Proof: godot_headless save tests + manual main_menu; optional gdc-main-menu.

nodes.title: Combat win Continue returns to map (manual)
nodes.description: Parity: demo-slice-combat-victory-to-map-manual. Victory → hub; location updated. Proof: godot_headless _test_victory_fair_field_updates_gamestate + STEAM_BUILD.md QA + manual full loop.

nodes.title: Combat Lane B + arena presentation (CP-02/03)
nodes.description: Parity: side-view stage + 3D arena in combat.tscn; combat_presentation*.gd + combat_voxel_arena.gd (procedural voxel grid). Proof: manual STEAM_BUILD + _test_scene_transition_smoke; TDAD_COMBAT_PRESENTATION_PLAN CP-02/03.

nodes.title: Parry/dodge eye + presentation_tick (CP-04/01)
nodes.description: Parity: parry_dodge_eye.tscn, CombatManager.presentation_tick during REAL_TIME_WINDOW. Proof: manual wireframe checklist; BDD @manual combat scenarios; godot-demo-components gdc-combat-scenarios.
